ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency traded */,
  "notional" REAL /* Notional value of the trade */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage used for the trade */,
  "collateral" REAL /* Collateral amount for the trade */,
  "side" INTEGER /* Side of the trade (1 for buy, -1 for sell) */,
  "entry_lvl" REAL /* Entry level of the trade */,
  "exit_lvl" REAL /* Exit level of the trade */,
  "trading_fee_in" REAL /* Trading fee for entering the trade */,
  "trading_fee_out" REAL /* Trading fee for exiting the trade */,
  "liquidation_fee" REAL /* Liquidation fee for the trade */,
  "days_elapsed" INTEGER /* Number of days the trade was active */,
  "trade_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trade was executed */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, liquidated) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., spot, margin, futures) */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order related to the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., ETH, BTC) */,
  "decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade the fee is associated with */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., trading fee, liquidation fee) */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fee was applied */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who incurred the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade the reward is associated with */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., trading reward, staking reward) */,
  "reward_amount" REAL /* Amount of the reward */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reward was earned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, staker, administrator) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading team the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency the exchange rate is for */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the exchange rate is for */,
  "rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the exchange rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "trading_volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency the trading volume is for */,
  "trading_volume" REAL /* Trading volume value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trading volume was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_calculations" (
  "reward_calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward calculation */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade the reward calculation is for */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., trading reward, staking reward) */,
  "reward_amount" REAL /* Amount of the reward */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reward calculation was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the reward was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_calculations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_calculations_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staking_rewards" (
  "staking_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staking reward */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the staking reward is for */,
  "reward_amount" REAL /* Amount of the staking reward */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the staking reward was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staking_reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_performance" (
  "trading_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading performance */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the trading performance is for */,
  "trading_PnL" REAL /* Trading profit and loss */,
  "funding_PnL" REAL /* Funding profit and loss */,
  "Unrealized_PnL" REAL /* Unrealized profit and loss */,
  "Realized_PnL" REAL /* Realized profit and loss */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trading performance was recorded */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cumulative_trading_volumes" (
  "cumulative_trading_volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cumulative trading volume */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency the cumulative trading volume is for */,
  "cumulative_trading_volume" REAL /* Cumulative trading volume value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the cumulative trading volume was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cumulative_trading_volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cumulative_trading_volumes_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)
